notes: 1959 brick block in Wola, post-renovation, ground floor, spółdzielcze własnościowe ownership form, czynsz 930 PLN (12.7 PLN/m² — within the normal 8–15 PLN/m² band, so we DON'T require it in §6 risks; the agent rightly treats it as an expense in §5, not a structural risk). Asking 1.29M PLN at 17,671 PLN/m². The reference case we've iterated on throughout development.
